title: Career move: compare relocation, housing, insurance & banking
intro: Once 2–4 city finalists exist, most professionals line up housing platforms, relocation support, mandatory health insurance, utilities, and banking in parallel — especially with start dates, visa timing, or employer packages in play. Scope and fees differ; confirm what your employer covers and what you must arrange yourself before retainers or deposits.
disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects relevance to international professionals relocating and setting up in the Netherlands after you shortlist cities — not pay-to-rank. This is not legal, tax, immigration, or career advice — verify with employers, recruiters, and qualified advisers.
